title: Denoising Autoencoder
summary: A type of autoencoder that learns to reconstruct the input data from a noisy version. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoder. It opens into BART Denoising Autoencoder and Denoising Autoencoder (DAE).

blocks.title: Overview
blocks.body: A type of autoencoder that learns to reconstruct the input data from a noisy version. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoder. It opens into BART Denoising Autoencoder and Denoising Autoencoder (DAE).
